name: cdn-mcp
description: Personal CDN MCP server on Cloudflare Workers + R2 + D1. Phase 11 adds OAuth 2.1 + DCR + Streamable HTTP for claude.ai Custom Connector.

scripts.test: tsx test/sanity.ts && tsx test/phase1.ts && tsx test/phase2.ts && tsx test/phase3.ts && tsx test/phase4.ts && tsx test/phase5a.ts && tsx test/phase11.ts
scripts.release-plugin: bash plugin/build.sh && gh release create plugin-v$(node -p "require('./plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json').version") cdn-mcp-plugin.plugin --repo code22d/cdn-mcp --title "Cowork Plugin v$(node -p "require('./plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json').version")" --notes-file plugin/README.md
scripts.release-skill: bash skills/cdn-setup/build.sh && gh release create cdn-setup-v$(node -p "require('./skills/cdn-setup/package.json').version") cdn-setup.skill --repo code22d/cdn-mcp --title "cdn-setup skill v$(node -p "require('./skills/cdn-setup/package.json').version")" --notes-file skills/cdn-setup/RELEASE-NOTES.md
